chapter_title: Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel
text: Whenever any person has received as transferee a properly endorsed certificate of ownership, he or she shall, within 10 days thereafter, forward the certificates with the transfer fee specified in Section 9855 to the department, and thereby make application for a certificate of ownership and certificate of number.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3.5. REGISTRATION AND TRANSFER OF VESSELS [9840 - 9928]
### Chapter 3. Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel [9900 - 9928]
##### § 9901

Whenever any person has received as transferee a properly endorsed certificate of ownership, he or she shall, within 10 days thereafter, forward the certificates with the transfer fee specified in Section 9855 to the department, and thereby make application for a certificate of ownership and certificate of number.

*(Amended by Stats. 1995, Ch. 766, Sec. 7. Effective January 1, 1996.)*
